daily.today_energy: Your mind is buzzing with creative energy today, Gemini. This is your moment to lean into conversations that matter and let your natural curiosity guide you toward unexpected connections and discoveries.
daily.love: There's a lightness in your romantic sphere right now. Whether you're coupled or single, someone's vibe is matching yours. Trust the flow and don't overthink the small moments—they're adding up.
daily.career: Your communication skills are your superpower today. Ideas you've been sitting on are ready to be shared. Your voice carries weight right now, so speak up in that meeting or pitch that concept you've been holding back.
daily.health: Your energy thrives on movement and mental stimulation today. Do something that gets both your body and mind activated—whether that's a walk with a podcast, dancing, or even a intense study session. You're feeling alive.

weekly.overview: Mercury's doing its thing this week, Gemini. You're feeling chatty and curious about everything, which honestly? Kind of your superpower rn. Trust those random conversations—they might lead somewhere unexpectedly cool.
weekly.love: Someone's vibing with your energy more than usual. Whether you're single or coupled up, there's a softness in the air that makes connection feel less forced and more... natural. Let yourself be a little vulnerable.
weekly.career: Your ideas are hitting different this week. That project or proposal you've been sitting on? This is the moment to share it. Your voice carries weight right now, so speak up with confidence.
weekly.health: Your nervous system's asking for a breather. Try something grounding—long walks, journaling, literally touching grass. Your body knows what it needs; just gotta listen to that inner voice.
